title: areca delight
description: This module adds new tree crops and a series of recipes related to their products, which links the farmer's pleasure module and adds dozens of special foods; As well as a large number of recipes related to mechanical power, which is convenient for players
body:
In this module, 150+ new items are added, and new trees are added: betel nut trees, ancient betel nut trees, and their saplings: green betel nut, ancient betel nut; After manual processing, it can be made into a series of foods, which provide powerful positive attributes, including extra health, strength, night vision, life recovery and injury absorption, but at the same time, it will also bring negative effects, such as nausea, poisoning, etc. Even if you eat too much in a short time, it will hurt your mouth, lead to slower food consumption, and you will get debilitating and blind debuff if you don't eat it for a long time. Therefore, the rational use of this powerful food requires strong self-control. Added three brand-new tool armor, each with unique wearing effect and attributes.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b23d1873cd6fc68e8912b71fad5ae085c2397ccb.png)![This picture shows some items of the module, as well as the added armor tools, new metal materials, and the seedling morphology and mature morphology of two trees.]

In addition, it is also linked with mechanical power and farmer's pleasure. After joining the farmer's pleasure module, you can make special dishes and make the dining table diversified! ! Added lock throat and refreshed buff.
![The picture shows the special dishes linked with farmers' pleasure and the stage modeling of the dishes that can be placed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/213b6561767a4c60d0ddc71860e60cff0d6ed8c2.png)

Mechanical power-related processing production line and formula display (it is suggested to add JEI module to explore the specific formula and production line design), which specifically includes the processes of collection, cutting, baking, liquid injection and so on, and finally makes all kinds of delicious food.![The assembly line idea of mechanical power is shown, including a power saw collecting device and a processing device.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/542a2696eabbac0305a5019a419a3fb10a241afa_0.webp)

The module is still being improved and developed. If you encounter any questions or bugs, you can respond. Thank you very much! ! !
